en.extract:
The pale-headed woodpecker (Gecinulus grantia) is a species of bird in the family Picidae.
It is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, China, India, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, Thailand, and Vietnam.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is a bamboo specialist, and a montane bird.
A molecular phylogenetic study published in 2017 found that the pale-headed woodpecker was embedded within the genus Dinopium and was a sister species to the olive-backed woodpecker (Dinopium rafflesii).

The '''pale-headed woodpecker''' ('''''Gecinulus grantia''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Picidae]].
It is found in [[Bangladesh]], [[Bhutan]], [[China]], [[India]], [[Laos]], [[Myanmar]], [[Nepal]], [[Thailand]], and [[Vietnam]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is a [[bamboo]] specialist,<ref>{{Cite bioRxiv |last1=Srinivasan |first1=Sidharth |last2=Biswakarma |first2=Aman |last3=Pradhan |first3=D.K. |last4=Rai |first4=Shambu |last5=Srinivasan |first5=Umesh |date=2023-10-10 |title=Bamboozling Interactions: Interspecific associations within mixed-species bird flocks in bamboo in the Eastern Himalaya |biorxiv=10.1101/2023.10.08.561415 }}</ref><ref>{{Cite bioRxiv |last1=Srinivasan |first1=Sidharth |last2=Biswakarma |first2=Aman |last3=Pradhan |first3=D.K. |last4=Rai |first4=Shambu |last5=Srinivasan |first5=Umesh |date=2023-01-29 |title=Poles apart: the structure and composition of the bird community in bamboo in the Eastern Himalaya |biorxiv=10.1101/2023.01.27.525938 }}</ref> and a [[Montane ecosystems|montane]] bird.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Zhao |first1=Min |last2=Chang |first2=Yongbin |last3=Kimball |first3=Rebecca T. |last4=Zhao |first4=Jian |last5=Lei |first5=Fumin |last6=Qu |first6=Yanhua |date=2018-11-28 |title=Pleistocene glaciation explains the disjunct distribution of the Chestnut-vented Nuthatch (Aves, Sittidae) |journal=Zoologica Scripta |volume=48 |issue=1 |pages=33–45 |doi=10.1111/zsc.12327 |issn=0300-3256|doi-access=free }}</ref>

A [[molecular phylogenetic]] study published in 2017 found that the pale-headed woodpecker was embedded within the genus ''[[Dinopium]]'' and was a [[sister taxon|sister species]] to the [[olive-backed woodpecker]] (''Dinopium rafflesii'').<ref>{{ cite journal | last1=Shakya | first1=S.B. | last2=Fuchs | first2=J. | last3=Pons | first3=J.M. | last4=Sheldon | first4=F.H. | year=2017 | title=Tapping the woodpecker tree for evolutionary insight | journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution | volume=116 | pages=182–191 | doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2017.09.005 | pmid=28890006 | url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/319596154 | doi-access=free | bibcode=2017MolPE.116..182S }}</ref>

zh.extract:
竹啄木鸟（学名：Gecinulus grantia）为啄木鸟科竹啄木鸟属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在印度。
分布于孟加拉国、不丹、中国、印度、老挝、缅甸、尼泊尔、泰国和越南。


亚种
竹啄木鸟包括以下亚种

竹啄木鸟指名亚种（学名：Gecinulus grantia grantia Horsfield, 1840）。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在印度。
竹啄木鸟云南亚种（学名：Gecinulus grantia indochineensis Delacour, 1927）。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在越南。
（学名：Gecinulus grantia poilanei Deignan, 1950）
（学名：Gecinulus grantia robinsoni Kloss, 1918）
竹啄木鸟东南亚种（学名：Gecinulus grantia viridanus Slater, 1897）。在中国大陆，分布于福建、广东等地。该物种的模式产地在福建。
（学名：Gecinulus grantia viridis Blyth, 1862）
